title: anacamptis papilionacea subsp. expansa
intro: Anacamptis papilionacea subsp. expansa, also known as the butterfly orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its distinctive shape and color. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as menstrual cramps and joint pain. The health benefits of Anacamptis papilionacea subsp. expansa include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and has also been used in herbal remedies for its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties.
